_comment: Copy to config.json and keep only one sessionStore block. Env vars always take precedence over this file (see CLAUDE.md for the full env var list).
_sessionStoreFlush_comment: Controls how aggressively transcript entries are flushed to the session store. 'batched' (default): buffer and flush at end-of-turn. 'eager': flush after every frame for near-real-time delivery — one append() call per frame, so the store should be cheap per call.

_sessionStore_s3._comment: S3 or S3-compatible store (e.g. MinIO, OrangeFS). Rename key to 'sessionStore' to activate.

credentials._comment: Omit 'credentials' to use the SDK credential chain (IAM role, ~/.aws, etc.).

_sessionStore_redis._comment: Redis store. Rename key to 'sessionStore' to activate.
